scripts.package:app: rm -rf builds/latest && mkdir -p builds/latest && cp -R packages/backend/dist builds/latest/backend-dist && cp -R packages/frontend/dist builds/latest/frontend-dist && tar -czf builds/apk-modder-app.tar.gz -C builds/latest .
scripts.release:app: pnpm run build && pnpm run package:app
scripts.docker:save: mkdir -p builds && docker save apk-modder:dev -o builds/apk-modder-image.tar
scripts.release:docker: pnpm run docker:build && pnpm run docker:save
